workflow.name: Create and send Pennylane invoices from webhook data with Slack and Gmail alerts
workflow.description:
## Who is this for

SMEs and freelancers using Pennylane (the leading French accounting platform) who want to automate invoice creation from their CRM, forms, or any business tool.

## What it does

This workflow receives deal or order data via a POST webhook, searches for the customer in Pennylane by email (or creates one if not found), generates a customer invoice with line items and VAT, optionally sends it by email through Pennylane, and notifies your team via Slack and/or Gmail with an HTML-formatted summary.

## How to set up

1. Import this workflow into n8n
2. Create a **Header Auth** credential with name `Authorization` and value `Bearer <YOUR_PENNYLANE_TOKEN>`
3. Select your Slack channel in the `SL Send Notification` node
4. (Optional) Connect your Gmail credential for HTML email notifications
5. Configure invoice numbering in your Pennylane settings (required for finalized invoices)
6. Send a test POST request to the webhook URL with a sample payload

## Requirements

- Pennylane account with API access (Essentiel plan or higher)
- Pennylane API token with scopes: `customer_invoices:all`, `customers:all`
- (Optional) Slack workspace for team notifications
- (Optional) Gmail OAuth for email notifications

## How to customize

- Set `draft: true` in the `Code Build Invoice Payload` node to create draft invoices for manual review before finalizing
- Replace Slack/Gmail with Telegram or any other notification channel
- See example payloads and CRM mappings (Pipedrive, Sellsy, Axonaut) in the GitHub repo: https://github.com/Gauthier-Huguenin/n8n-pennylane-auto-invoicing

workflow.name: Create and send Pennylane invoices from webhook data

parameters.content:
# Create and send Pennylane invoices from webhook data

## Who is this for

SMEs and freelancers using Pennylane (French accounting platform) who want to automate invoice creation from their CRM, forms, or any business tool.

## What it does

This workflow receives deal or order data via a POST webhook, searches for the customer in Pennylane (or creates one), generates a customer invoice with line items and VAT, optionally sends it by email through Pennylane, and notifies your team via Slack and/or Gmail.

## How to set up

1. Import this workflow into n8n
2. Create a Header Auth credential: name `Authorization`, value `Bearer <YOUR_PENNYLANE_TOKEN>`
3. Select your Slack channel in the SL Send Notification node
4. (Optional) Connect your Gmail credential for email notifications
5. Configure invoice numbering in your Pennylane settings
6. Send a test POST request to the webhook URL

## Requirements

- Pennylane account with API access (Essentiel plan or higher)
- Pennylane API token with scopes: customer_invoices:all, customers:all
- (Optional) Slack workspace
- (Optional) Gmail OAuth credentials

Full documentation: https://github.com/Gauthier-Huguenin/n8n-pennylane-auto-invoicing

---

### Flow

`WH Receive Invoice Data`
  → `Code Validate Payload`
  → `PL Search Customer`
  → `IF Customer Exists`
    → ✅ `Set Customer ID`
    → ❌ `PL Create Customer` → `Set Customer ID`
  → `Code Build Invoice Payload`
  → `PL Create Invoice`
  → `IF Send Email`
    → ✅ `Wait PDF Generation` → `PL Send Invoice Email`
  → `Code Build Notification`
    → `SL Send Notification`
    → `IF Has Notification Email`
      → ✅ `GM Send Notification`
  → `Set Output Response`

---

### Node refs for $()

- WH Receive Invoice Data
- Code Validate Payload
- PL Search Customer
- IF Customer Exists
- Set Customer ID
- PL Create Customer
- Code Build Invoice Payload
- PL Create Invoice
- IF Send Email
- Wait PDF Generation
- PL Send Invoice Email
- Code Build Notification
- SL Send Notification
- IF Has Notification Email
- GM Send Notification
- Set Output Response

parameters.message:
=

New Invoice Created

Customer {{ $('Code Build Notification').item.json.customer_name }}
Invoice {{ $('Code Build Notification').item.json.invoice_number }}
Amount HT {{ $('PL Create Invoice').item.json.currency_amount_before_tax }} EUR
Total TTC {{ $('Code Build Notification').item.json.amount }} EUR
Due date {{ $('Code Validate Payload').item.json.due_date }}
Status {{ $('PL Create Invoice').item.json.status }}
View Invoice PDF

Sent automatically by n8n-pennylane-auto-invoicing
parameters.subject: =[Pennylane] Invoice {{ $('Code Build Notification').item.json.invoice_number }} created for {{ $('Code Build Notification').item.json.customer_name }}

parameters.content:
## 1. Input

Receives invoice data via POST webhook.
Any CRM, form, or script can call this endpoint.

See `examples/` folder in the GitHub repo
for sample payloads.

## 2. Validation

Checks required fields:
- customer_name
- customer_email
- items[] with label, quantity, unit_price

Applies defaults:
- country: FR
- currency: EUR
- vat_rate: FR_200
- due_date: +30 days
- payment_conditions: 30_days

## 3. Customer lookup

Searches Pennylane for an existing customer
by email. Creates one if not found.

Endpoint: GET /customers (filter by emails)
Endpoint: POST /company_customers

Required billing_address fields:
address, postal_code, city, country_alpha2

## 4. Invoice creation

Builds the invoice payload with line items,
VAT, and deadline, then sends it to Pennylane.

Endpoint: POST /customer_invoices

Amounts must be strings (e.g. "1500.00").
VAT codes: FR_200 (20%), FR_100 (10%),
FR_055 (5.5%), exempt (0%).

Set draft: true to create without finalizing.

## 5. Email sending (optional)

If send_email is true in the payload,
waits 30s for PDF generation, then sends
the invoice to the customer via Pennylane.

Endpoint: POST /customer_invoices/{id}/send_by_email

A 409 means the PDF is not ready yet.

## 6. Notifications

Slack: always sends a summary to your channel.
Gmail: sends an HTML notification if
notification_email is provided in the payload.

Both are optional. Remove or replace
with your preferred channel (Telegram, etc.).

## 7. Webhook response

Returns a JSON response to the caller with:
- success: true/false
- invoice_id
- invoice_number
- amount
- customer
- public_url (link to PDF)

Configure Error Workflow in Settings
for production error handling.

user.name: Gauthier Huguenin
user.bio: Freelance AI automation consultant. I build n8n workflows, AI agents, and voice agents for SMEs. 150+ AI voice agents deployed in production. Specializing in n8n + French business tools (Pennylane, Pipedrive, Brevo). Self-hosted on Hetzner/Coolify.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
